events.label: tool result
events.text: File created successfully at: /app/answer.json (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the staged breaker's trip rating exceeds the conductor's actual ampacity (NEC 240.4 violation), likely because ampacity was pulled from the insulation's temperature column instead of the lowest termination rating per 110.14(C). Decision is `fail` (high risk) with corrective steps — re-verify ampacity at the correct termination temperature, match breaker to conductor (or vice versa), and confirm AFCI/GFCI requirements per 210.12(B)/210.8(B) — before any conductors are landed.
